") center/cover;
    }
    .time-layout{
      position:relative;z-index:1;
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:minmax(430px,1.2fr) minmax(320px,.8fr);
      gap:42px;
      align-items:center;
      min-height:590px;
      margin-top:10px;
    }
    .time-dial{
      width:min(570px,90%);
      aspect-ratio:1;
      margin:auto;
      position:relative;
      display:grid;place-items:center;
      filter:drop-shadow(0 35px 45px rgba(0,0,0,.35));
    }
    .time-dial:before,.time-dial:after{
      content:"";position:absolute;border-radius:50%;
      border:1px solid rgba(247,235,216,.22);
    }
    .time-dial:before{inset:4%}
    .time-dial:after{inset:14%;border-style:dashed;animation:slowSpin 38s linear infinite}
    @keyframes slowSpin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
    .time-dial svg{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;transform:rotate(-90deg)}
    .dial-track{fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.07);stroke-width:1.5}
    .dial-arc{fill:none;stroke-linecap:round;transition:stroke-dashoffset 1s var(--ease)}
    .dial-arc.today{stroke:#9eb29a;stroke-width:2}
    .dial-arc.session{stroke:#e3bd78;stroke-width:1.5}
    .dial-arc.reward{stroke:#c46e62;stroke-width:1.1}
    .dial-center{text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:2}
    .dial-center span{display:block;color:#a9a094;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.25em}
    .dial-center strong{
      display:block;margin:10px 0 4px;color:var(--cream);
      font:400 clamp(58px,6vw,92px)/.9 var(--serif);
      letter-spacing:-.055em;
    }
    .dial-center em{color:#b8aea1;font:italic 17px var(--serif)}
    .roman{
      position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;
      color:rgba(245,235,218,.62);
      font:12px var(--serif);
      transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(var(--angle)) translateY(-245px) rotate(calc(-1 * var(--angle)));
    }
    .time-journal{
      position:relative;
      padding:30px 0 30px 45px;
    }
    .time-journal:before{
      content:"";position:absolute;left:13px;top:5%;bottom:5%;width:1px;
      background:linear-gradient(transparent,var(--gold-soft),rgba(255,255,255,.14),transparent);
    }
    .time-journal:after{
      content:"";position:absolute;left:7px;top:50%;
      width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;
      background:var(--gold-soft);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 9px rgba(224,183,111,.08),0 0 26px rgba(224,183,111,.35);
      animation:nodeBreathe 3s infinite;
    }
    .time-quote{
      margin:0 0 28px;
      color:#f0e7da;
      font:italic 400 clamp(23px,2.5vw,36px)/1.25 var(--serif);
    }
    .time-stat{
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;align-items:end;
      padding:20px 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);
    }
    .time-stat label{display:block;color:#9f978c;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.22em}
    .time-stat p{margin:6px 0 0;color:#aaa195;font-size:10px}
    .time-stat strong{color:var(--cream);font:400 clamp(28px,3vw,45px) var(--serif)}
    .time-reward{
      margin-top:22px;padding:16px 19px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:20px;
      color:#d5ccbf;background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
      font-size:10px;line-height:1.65;
    }

    /* Scenes */
    .scenes-page{padding:clamp(32px,4vw,66px)}
    .scene-header{
      position:relative;z-index:3;
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;align-items:start;gap:30px;
    }
    .scene-heading h2{margin-bottom:17px}
    .pocket-watch{
      position:relative;
      width:154px;height:176px;
      margin:3px 20px 0 0;
    }
    .watch-chain{
      position:absolute;left:76px;top:-82px;
      width:54px;height:100px;
      border-left:1px dashed rgba(232,204,151,.47);
      border-radius:50%;
      transform:rotate(12deg);
      transform-origin:bottom;
      animation:watchSwing 5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .watch-chain:after{
      content:"";position:absolute;bottom:0;left:-7px;
      width:14px;height:14px;border:1px solid rgba(232,204,151,.55);border-radius:50%;
    }
    @keyframes watchSwing{50%{transform:rotate(-9deg)}}
    .watch-face{
      position:absolute;left:7px;bottom:0;
      width:140px;height:140px;border-radius:50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle,#eee4d4 0 56%,#b6945e 57% 59%,#3d3428 60% 64%,#c6a66f 65% 67%,#24201b 68%);
      box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.35),inset 0 0 18px rgba(72,51,26,.2);
      color:#3b3025;
    }
    .watch-face:before{
      content:"XII   ·   III   ·   VI   ·   IX";
      position:absolute;inset:19px 12px;
      font:9px var(--serif);
      word-spacing:19px;
      text-align:center;
      color:#67543b;
    }
    .watch-hand{
      position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;
      width:1px;background:#6b3c34;
      transform-origin:bottom center;border-radius:2px;
    }
    .watch-hand.hour{height:33px;margin-top:-33px;transform:rotate(0deg)}
    .watch-hand.minute{height:46px;margin-top:-46px;transform:rotate(0deg);background:#32291f}
    .watch-pin{
      position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;
      transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:#9c554a;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(156,85,74,.16);
    }
    .watch-digital{
      position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:26px;transform:translateX(-50%);
      font:8px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.12em;color:#78634a;
    }
    .scene-gallery{
      position:relative;z-index:2;
      margin-top:44px;
      padding:56px 18px 45px;
      overflow-x:auto;overflow-y:hidden;
      scrollbar-width:none;
      mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#000 3%,#000 97%,transparent);
    }
    .scene-gallery::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    .scene-curve{
      position:absolute;left:0;top:5px;
      min-width:1320px;width:100%;height:94px;
      overflow:visible;pointer-events:none;
    }
    .scene-curve path:first-child{fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.13);stroke-width:1}
    .scene-curve path:last-child{
      fill:none;stroke:url(#sceneLine);stroke-width:1.5;stroke-dasharray:2 11;
      animation:sceneDash 7s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes sceneDash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-150}}
    .scene-track{
      min-width:1320px;
      display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-around;
      gap:23px;
      padding:0 30px 22px;
    }
    .scene-card{
      --lift:0px;
      position:relative;
      flex:0 0 160px;
      margin-top:var(--lift);
      padding:8px 8px 13px;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);
      border-radius:20px;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,.055);
      color:var(--paper);
      text-align:left;
      opacity:.37;
      filter:saturate(.72);
      transition:opacity .5s,filter .5s,transform .5s var(--ease),box-shadow .5s,border-color .5s;
      animation:cardArrival .65s var(--ease) both;
      animation-delay:calc(var(--i) * 85ms);
    }
    @keyframes cardArrival{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-35px) rotate(-2deg)}}
    .scene-card:nth-child(2),.scene-card:nth-child(6){--lift:28px}
    .scene-card:nth-child(3),.scene-card:nth-child(5){--lift:51px}
    .scene-card:nth-child(4){--lift:66px}
    .scene-card:before{
      content:"";position:absolute;left:50%;top:-43px;
      width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;
      transform:translateX(-50%);
      background:#8c857a;
      box-shadow:0 0 0 7px rgba(255,255,255,.035);
      animation:scenePulse 2.9s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes scenePulse{50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 14px rgba(222,184,117,0);background:#cfa963}}
    .scene-card img{
      width:100%;height:172px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:14px;
      filter:brightness(.63);transition:.55s var(--ease);
    }
    .scene-card small{display:block;margin:10px 3px 2px;color:#aaa195;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.16em}
    .scene-card b{
      display:block;margin:1px 3px 0;
      font:italic 400 19px var(--serif);
      letter-spacing:.01em;
    }
    .scene-card:hover{opacity:.72;filter:none;transform:translateY(-5px)}
    .scene-card.on{
      opacity:1;filter:none;z-index:4;
      transform:translateY(-16px) scale(1.15);
      border-color:rgba(235,198,133,.72);
      box-shadow:0 25px 55px rgba(0,0,0,.42),0 0 0 5px rgba(210,171,101,.06);
    }
    .scene-card.on:before{background:var(--gold-soft);box-shadow:0 0 0 9px rgba(224,184,112,.13),0 0 28px rgba(224,184,112,.45)}
    .scene-card.on img{filter:brightness(.94) saturate(.96);transform:scale(1.015)}

    /* Album */
    .album-page{
      background:
        linear-gradient(110deg,rgba(22,19,16,.89),rgba(28,23,18,.59)),
        url("data:image/webp;base64,
